sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108640" key="u(poku/klios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκύκλιος</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in metre, the <sense id="n108640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ionic a minore,</tr_> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:p.302" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.302</biblScope> </bibl> C., al.</sense> </entryFree>
